title: Kiosk KYC attestation
description: The decoded JWS payload of a KYC attestation and the POST /kiosk/agents/kyc request body.

attestation.description: Signed by the KYC provider, verified with its configured public key.

level.description: Binary; anything other than "verified" is rejected.

iss.description: MUST equal the provider-configured KYC issuer.

iat.description: Optional; issued-at timestamp. Not enforced by the verifier.

exp.description: REQUIRED; an expired attestation is rejected.

attributes.description: OPTIONAL named ANONYMIZED boolean attributes the KYC provider vouches for (e.g. age_over_18, licence_a). Anonymized: the provider learns only these booleans — never the underlying DOB, licence number, or document. Additive: a bare attestation with no attributes still verifies as binary. Only values that are literally true are honoured; a downstream Action MAY gate on required attribute names and reject with kyc_required (403) when they are not all present-and-true.

kyc_jws.description: The attestation as a compact RS256 JWS.
